title: Grandparents
questions: What were the names of your mother's parents?
When and where were they born?
Do you have personal memories of them?
What were the names of your father's parents?
When and where were your parents born?
What did your parents do for a living?
What do you remember hearing about your great-grandparents?
Who was the oldest family member you remember meeting?
What do you remember about them?
Why did they come to the U.S.?
Did they ever describe their lives?
What country did they or their ancestors come to the United States from?
What traditions are still practiced in your family?
